## Phase

Which phase does this belong to?

- [ ] Phase 1: Static app shell
- [ ] Phase 2: Frontend interactions and mock data
- [ ] Phase 3: Backend foundation
- [ ] Phase 4: Video upload and streaming pipeline
- [ ] Phase 5: Creator Studio tools

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept this work inside the correct phase.
- [ ] I did not add out-of-scope backend/video/payment logic.
- [ ] I kept the repo structure organized.
- [ ] I avoided YouTube-copy layout patterns.
- [ ] I updated documentation if needed.
- [ ] I included screenshots for UI changes, if applicable.
